tasks.title: [RED] PushNotificationManager tests
tasks.description: Write tests/server/test_push_notification_manager.py: test set_config (missing id→-32602, missing url→-32602, invalid URL→-32602, HTTP URL in prod→-32602, loopback→-32602, private IP→-32602, task not found→-32001, success→stored), get_config, delete_config, notify (success, retry 3x with delays, mark failed after exhaustion), localhost allowed in test mode

tasks.title: [GREEN] PushNotificationManager implementation
tasks.description: Implement src/apcore_a2a/server/push.py: PushNotificationManager with httpx.AsyncClient, set_config (SSRF validation: HTTPS-only, reject loopback 127.0.0.1/::1/localhost, reject RFC-1918 ranges), get_config, delete_config, notify (fire-and-forget, 3 retries with [1s,2s,4s] backoff, mark failed)

tasks.title: [REFACTOR] Push notifications cleanup
tasks.description: Extract SSRF validation logic into helper, verify all retry delays [1.0, 2.0, 4.0] match spec, verify X-A2A-Notification-Token header sent, run mypy
